category_sources: Official docs and GitHub README describe Pelican as a static site generator written in Python.
source_facts.description says static site generator supporting Markdown and reST.
docs_sources: Official docs.getpelican.com site is the dedicated Pelican documentation domain.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page is getpelican/pelican and says Pelican source code is hosted on GitHub.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from official sources.
tags_sources: Official README lists Markdown, reStructuredText, HTML input and Python implementation.
source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI static site generator.
